tensions.topic: 2016 election result phrasing in the lead
COVID-19 response wording in the lead
survivor_texts: User stated that Trump reacted slowly to the COVID-19 pandemic by minimizing the threat, ignoring or contradicting recommendations from health officials, and promoting false information about unproven treatments.
Under Trump's administration, the United States recorded more confirmed COVID-19 cases than any other country, and the crisis prompted the largest economic stimulus in U.S. history.

User mentioned that Trump did not confront Putin over Russia's alleged bounties on American soldiers in Afghanistan, which were later reported by the Biden administration to be held with only low-to-moderate confidence.
User mentioned that Trump never confronted Putin over Russia's alleged bounties for killing American soldiers in Afghanistan.
The Abraham Accords were a significant diplomatic achievement of the Trump administration, under which Israel normalized relations with the UAE, Bahrain, Morocco, and Sudan.

User believes the Abraham Accords were largely ceremonial agreements between states already at de facto peace, with limited personal involvement from Trump, and suggests they are better covered in dedicated foreign-policy articles.
User believes that a dedicated subsection on Joe Biden's gaffes in his biography would give undue weight to the topic.

User believes Joe Biden's biography should include a subsection on his gaffes, as his speech mistakes are extensively covered across the political spectrum and he has referred to himself as a 'gaffe machine'.
User prefers the confirmed-cases-per-capita map to be featured most prominently in the lead infobox, with the deaths-per-capita map as secondary.
User prefers the deaths-per-capita map to be featured most prominently in the lead infobox, as they consider deaths the most significant measure of the pandemic's impact.
